business_ideas.idea: Reverse engineer successful businesses via Quiet Light brokerage and replicate.
Niche membership community (HVAC automation, sales for chiropractors, etc).
QSBS advisory firm for tech startups to protect $10M tax exclusions.
Humanoid robot startup to replace jobs across industries.
Purpose-built robots for specific jobs (pizza, roofing, powder coating).
Buy and rebrand undervalued university with premium positioning.
Sell NFT admissions licenses (PSL model) for recurring revenue.
Defense contracting business like Andril (weapons tech).

predictions.text: Purpose-built robots will dominate labor market like dishwashers did.
Humanoids will replace 40% of jobs in 12 years according to Kai Fu Lee.
University admissions NFT licenses will appreciate over time.
Buying accredited universities is viable business with 25-50M valuations.
